title: Today's date in a Gmail integration
excerpt:

posts.author: jason.clark (jason clark)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set up an integration to send an email to my customers each morning on the status of their jobs. We use pulses to identify our jobs, as we are a university print shop. It works great and lets them know the status.

In the subject line I’d like to put in the current date. “Job# {pulse.name} status update for…” I put in place a formula but the integration won’t recognize it. Any help out there in the community?
